quality.rationale: 从黎曼张量缩并至线性化爱因斯坦场方程，结合洛伦兹规范与迹反转变换完成多步推导，具有明确的引力波物理背景

origin.question:

Solution 13.15. In Problem 13.13 we found an expression for the linearized Riemann tensor. By contracting this we can get the linearized Ricci tensor$$\mathbf {R}_{\mu 
u} =  rac {1}{2} \left(\mathbf {h}_{
u \alpha},^{\alpha}, \mu + \mathbf {h}_{\mu \alpha},^{\alpha},
